overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style game showing a character walking through a futuristic urban plaza and covered corridors at night during light rain. The environment features massive holographic advertisements, wet reflective pavement, neon-lit storefronts, and diverse pedestrians with umbrellas.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza observing the holographic billboards and surroundings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian holding a glowing purple umbrella walking ahead of the character

massive central holographic screen with cyberpunk imagery
row of public benches with illuminated orange seating

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open urban plaza at night surrounded by massive holographic advertisements glowing in pink and blue. The wet asphalt reflects the neon lights while other pedestrians, some carrying umbrellas, move through the space. Orange benches line the right side of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial corridor with neon storefronts

events.description: exits open plaza and enters narrower commercial street with shop fronts and neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking past various shop fronts and illuminated signs in the covered corridor

entered.detail: storefronts with bright neon lighting and commercial signage
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
covered walkway structure with metal beams and lighting

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrower commercial corridor with shop fronts featuring neon signs. The walls display graffiti and posters, and the space feels more enclosed than the open plaza. Pedestrians walk in both directions along the tiled pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit area with graffiti-covered concrete wall and stairway

events.description: approaches large concrete wall covered in extensive graffiti with stairs leading upward

agents.ego_description: walking toward the graffiti wall and stairs, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: character in athletic wear running up the concrete stairs

entered.detail: massive concrete wall covered in layered graffiti tags and street art
wide concrete staircase leading to upper level with metal railings
vertical banner with red skull logo hanging from overhead structure

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a massive concrete wall covered in dense graffiti art. To the left, a wide staircase leads upward while a red skull banner hangs overhead. The environment shifts from commercial shops to a more industrial transit area with concrete surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under elevated highway with planters

events.description: enters covered area beneath elevated highway structure with concrete planters and benches

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass past concrete planters and small vendor stalls

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a bench under the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with metal railings and support columns
large rectangular planters with benches and spiky plants
small food vendor stall with green awning and neon open sign

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a massive elevated highway structure in a dimly lit corridor. Concrete planters with benches line the right side while a small food stall with a green awning appears on the left. The space feels industrial and sheltered from the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic corridor with neon-lit building facade

events.description: enters futuristic corridor alongside building with colorful neon strip lighting

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the futuristic building with vibrant neon reflections on the wet ground

entered.detail: modern building facade with vertical strips of pink, blue, and purple neon lighting
large digital advertisement screen with purple border displaying product imagery

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a futuristic corridor with a striking building on the right displaying vibrant vertical neon strips in pink, blue, and purple. A large digital billboard stands on the left while the wet pavement reflects the colorful lights. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with high-tech architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked cyberpunk city, transitioning from a wide, neon-lit plaza into a series of increasingly enclosed industrial and high-tech corridors. It begins in an open urban square where massive pink and blue holograms reflect off wet asphalt and orange benches line the path. As the camera moves forward, the space narrows into a commercial corridor filled with neon storefronts and graffiti-covered walls before shifting toward a more industrial transit area marked by a wide staircase and a red skull banner. The scene then descends beneath a massive elevated highway, passing concrete planters and a small food stall under a sheltered, dimly lit ceiling. Finally, the environment opens back up into a futuristic corridor dominated by a building with vibrant vertical neon strips and a large digital billboard reflecting across the damp pavement.
